mapper.insert:
insert into t_subscription_data
airway_reservation_id,
subscription_id,
area_info,
airway_id,
#{airwayReservationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{subscriptionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{areaInfo,jdbcType=ARRAY,typeHandler=com.intent_exchange.drone_highway.handler.myBatis.ArrayTypeHandler},
#{airwayId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
on conflict (airway_reservation_id) do update set
airway_reservation_id = EXCLUDED.airway_reservation_id,
subscription_id = EXCLUDED.subscription_id,
area_info = EXCLUDED.area_info,
airway_id = EXCLUDED.airway_id,
mapper.select: WITH expanded_airway_section_ids AS ( SELECT unnest(airway_section_ids) AS airway_section_id FROM t_airway_reservation ar WHERE ar.airway_reservation_id = #{airwayReservationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ), airway_section_geometry_collection AS ( SELECT adsg.geometry, adsg.airway_id FROM v_airway_design_section_geometry adsg JOIN expanded_airway_section_ids easi ON adsg.airway_section_id = easi.airway_section_id ) SELECT ST_Expand(Box2D(ST_Collect(array_agg(asgc.geometry))), 0.001) AS box2d, replace(array_to_string(array_agg(DISTINCT asgc.airway_id), ','), '{}', '') AS airway_id FROM airway_section_geometry_collection asgc ;
